lines.quest_name: All Out! Towards the Peaks of Prestige

lines.text: Well, at least I know you can take good care of yourself, even without my advice.
lines.quest_name: All Out! Towards the Peaks of Prestige

lines.text: As your reward... Here's the third Medal of Prestige, the Lifespring Medal.
lines.quest_name: All Out! Towards the Peaks of Prestige

lines.text: The next Lord of Prestige can usually be found near the Village of Respite.
lines.quest_name: All Out! Towards the Peaks of Prestige

lines.text: May your journey be free of pain. Safe travels, Challenger.
lines.quest_name: All Out! Towards the Peaks of Prestige
